title: UnscheduledTransferEnum
description: The qualification of the type of ad-hoc transfers and cash flows that can be associated with contracts and their lifecycle events.

oneOf.title: Recall
oneOf.description: A recall of securities by the lender who has lent them out.

oneOf.title: Return
oneOf.description: A return by the borrower to the lender of the full or partial quantity of securities on the contract.
